title: RVDV private overlay
description: This project is my custom overlay for sword / smp!
body:
Hello! This is my private overlay for PVP gamemodes like smp, mace and sword!

What does this pack do?

- Custom netherite sword
- Custom diamond sword
- Custom netherite axe
- Custom diamond axe
- Custom totem 
- Custom mace
- Dark blue diamond armor
- Smaller crit particles
- Red crit particles


Thanks for all of the support, hope you like it!
